summary: Iteration 1 architecture confirmed as presentation-layer only. Zero rideglory-api changes. Zero domain/data/DI/router changes. Two new design-system primitives defined: AppEventBadge atom (lib/design_system/atoms/badges/) from frame zKkmE, and DocumentSlotPill molecule (lib/design_system/molecules/feedback/) from frame aGqnv — the molecule is built once in iter-1 and reused for SOAT badge wiring in iter-2. Color tokenization strategy (3-tier: colorScheme → AppColors → status palette) defined and documented. Module PR cadence (5 PRs, ≤ 40 files each) validated against shared-file impact. Slim handoffs delivered to backend (stand-down), frontend, devops (no-op), and qa.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.detail: architect.md + 4 slim role handoffs + DIAGRAMS.md + iteration_checkpoint.md updated + skill updated

qualityGates.name: architecture_contracts_defined
qualityGates.detail: Iter-1 contract: zero new API endpoints, zero domain models, zero DTOs. Two design-system primitives specified with file paths, constructor signatures, color sources, and barrel-export instructions. Color tokenization 3-tier policy documented with grep procedure.

qualityGates.name: slim_handoffs_within_120_lines
qualityGates.detail: architect-for-backend.md, architect-for-frontend.md, architect-for-devops.md, architect-for-qa.md each under 120 lines.

qualityGates.name: no_scope_drift
qualityGates.detail: All decisions stay inside PO scope. No backend pre-implementation. No iter-2 SOAT logic. ManageAttendeesPage explicitly deferred. Tracking/Profile/Users features explicitly out of scope.
